key_points: The poem is an inspirational message about the importance of perseverance
If you fail at first, you should not be discouraged or stop working
Success comes to those who keep trying despite their initial failures
The poet explains that failing is not a reason to feel ashamed
Time and effort are the keys to mastering any difficult task
examples: A student failing a test but studying harder for the next one
If you find your task is hard, time will bring you your reward
Winning a race after losing many times before through practice
The poem suggests that if others can do it, you can do it too with patience
The concept of 'Try Again' acting as a golden rule for life
formulas_or_processes: Reaction → Do not fear or give up; show courage
Action → Persist and put in more effort
exam_tips: Remember the main theme: never give up on your goals
Note that 'Try Again' is the most repeated and important phrase
Understand that the poet views failure as a step toward success, not a disgrace
Focus on the word 'perseverance' as it is the core message of the poem
